title: draba stellata
intro: Draba stellata, also known as Stellaria draba, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Western North America. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The roots and leaves of Draba stellata can be prepared as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions.
